info.name: Car Hero - Customer App API
info.description: Clean customer mobile application API: authentication, catalog, orders, live tracking, chat, wallet, vehicles, subscriptions, notifications, and customer self-service workflows.

exec: pm.test('Response status is not server error', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.below(500); });
const json = (() => { try { return pm.response.json(); } catch (e) { return {}; } })();
const accessToken = json.accessToken || json.access_token || json.token || json?.data?.accessToken || json?.data?.access_token || json?.tokens?.accessToken || json?.data?.tokens?.accessToken;
const refreshToken = json.refreshToken || json.refresh_token || json?.data?.refreshToken || json?.data?.refresh_token || json?.tokens?.refreshToken || json?.data?.tokens?.refreshToken;
const userId = json.user?._id || json.user?.id || json?.data?.user?._id || json?.data?.user?.id || json.admin?._id || json.admin?.id || json?.data?.admin?._id || json?.data?.admin?.id;

request.description: Atomically redeem loyalty points and record the redemption transaction.
Request smart recommendations for towing service providers in Damascus using the active AI/Rule mode.

exec: pm.test('Response is valid AI recommendation structure', function () {
pm.test('Scoring breakdown is present on recommendations', function () {

request.description: Request recommendations for a non-existent specialty category. This triggers the fallback query to find general active providers in Damascus.
Request recommendations excluding specific providers that failed to respond or accept the order.
List saved addresses for the authenticated customer.
Create a saved customer address.
Update an owned saved address.
Set an owned address as default.
Delete an owned saved address.
List tokenized payment methods for the authenticated customer.
Create a tokenized payment method. Never send a full card number or CVV.
Update an owned tokenized payment method.
Set an owned payment method as default.
Delete an owned non-cash payment method.
List active offers currently available to the customer.
Reserve or apply an offer for the authenticated customer.
List recurring wash plans for the authenticated customer.
Create a recurring wash plan.
Update an owned recurring wash plan.
Delete an owned recurring wash plan.
Register or refresh an FCM token for push notifications.
Deactivate a registered push-notification device token.
